channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Abbott surges Texas troopers to border after cartel kingpin’s killing sparks violence in Mexico
item.description: Gov. Greg Abbott announced he is surging state troopers to the border and across the state to enhance public safety operations amid an ongoing spike i...

item.title: House Dem compares Trump's illegal immigration crackdown to 'terrorism,' vows to abolish ICE
item.description: Oregon Democrat compares U.S. immigration enforcement to "terrorism" in viral town hall video, vowing to dismantle ICE if party regains political powe...

item.title: DHS shutdown looms over Mar-a-Lago shooting as unpaid Secret Service agents neutralize armed suspect
item.description: Secret Service agents working without pay due to DHS shutdown shot armed intruder at Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort after he allegedly brandished shotgun.

item.title: California allocating $35M to support illegal immigrants amid Trump's mass deportation agenda
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom announced $35 million in state funding to support illegal immigrants amid President Donald Trump's mass deportation agend...

item.title: Iran May Be Pairing Ballistic Missiles With Chemical Warheads, Israeli Adviser Warns
Randy Fine Plans to Troll Dog-Haters With Furry State of the Union Guest
Boom: MS Gov. Tate Reeves Schools Gavin Newsom on California Reading Scores vs. Mississippi
Forget Guns - the Supreme Court’s NRA Decision Is About Who Gets Access to the Financial System
Social media erupts after Stephen King makes false claim about Trump's family: 'What is this sh--?'
item.description: Stephen King slams Trump's personal life on social media ahead of the State of the Union, calling the president inexperienced and unqualified in his l...

item.title: You Really Otter Watch This: Snowstorm Frolics in Baltimore
